title: Song Of The Saints Tour with Phil Wickham
description: Reserved/GA PIT Doors - 5:30PM Show - 7:00PM Join Phil Wickham with Tauren Wells and special guest Jamie MacDonald on the Song of the Saints Tour! Hitting 24 cities across the US in the Spring of 2026, this tour will feature many of your favorite songs like This Is Our God, House of the Lord, and Hymn of Heaven, as well as new songs from his newly released album, Song of the Saints (What An Awesome God, The King Is In The Room, and Homesick for Heaven). Join Phil, Tauren, and Jamie for the Song of the Saints Tour! Get your tickets today... we can't wait to see you there!

title: Dancing with the Stars of Charlotte
description: Dancing with the Stars of Charlotte, Inc 10th Annual Fundraising Event. Dancing with the Stars of Charlotte, Inc. is dedicated to supporting other Charlotte-based organizations with the goal of advancing equitable access to quality healthcare. Through our 501(c)(3) non-profit organization, we strive to empower all members of our community by leveraging the universal language of dance to inspire positive change. By uniting individuals, businesses, and organizations, we aim to create a healthier, more equitable future for the city of Charlotte.

title: World Ballet Company: Swan Lake With A LIVE Orchestra
description: The World's MOST Iconic Ballet - with a LIVE Orchestra! World Ballet Company's Swan Lake is a breathtaking production featuring 50 professional dancers, over 150 hand-crafted costumes, and Tchaikovsky's unforgettable score, performed LIVE by an incredible orchestra. From moonlit lakes to glittering palace halls, this spellbindng ballet captures the power of love, the pull of destiny, and the beauty of classical dance in its most captivating form. "One of the most transcendent cultural experiences I have had in a long time." - Times Advocate "... stunning costumes, hand-painted sets and stirring music ..." - LA Magazine *About the Company: Based in Los Angeles and led by Sasha Gorskaya and Gulya Hartwick, World Ballet Company presents the most beloved and iconic ballets of our time in cities nationwide. Driven by the belief that ballet is for everyone, performances appeal to newcomers and seasoned ballet goers alike

title: Bach & Beyond with Charlotte Symphony Orchestra
description: J.S. Bachs exhilarating Brandenburg Concertos frame an evening that bridges the Baroque spirit across centuries, paired with Handels glittering Water Music and contemporary reflections on the form by Caroline Shaw and Nancy Galbriath. Held in the historic Carolina Theatre, this concert brings the vitality and clarity of Baroque music into the present.
